title: Add CSS variables for dusk theme
description: Define grayscale CSS variables for dusk theme. Sunset-inspired, warmer grays, slightly darker than daylight.
acceptanceCriteria: Variables for background, foreground, muted, border
Grayscale; dusk = warmer, slightly darker than daylight

steps.details: In lib/src/styles.css, add [data-theme='dusk'] { ... }. Use warm gray tones, slightly darker background than daylight.
